Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS sample_count, (count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(coalesce(ts_pivot."up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", ts_pivot."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM (SELECT comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AS bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AS state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp AS timestamp, sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", sum(CASE WHEN (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1) THEN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE NULL END) AS "up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade IN (0, 1) AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state = 'CO' GROUP BY comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp) AS ts_pivot JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = ts_pivot.bldg_id AND bs.state = ts_pivot.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/1bf3829abe32e93d0e62b8737bec77eb4906de873cd7e94cd18534a9a0ffd4e0/e5113fa0-560d-4133-8d35-d02a36ea7d55/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
